Seamlessly extend any image in any direction with AI. Open-source web app powered by Gemini via OpenRouter, with Poisson-blended seams and best-of-3 variant picker.
Type-check the TypeScript & JavaScript code in your Markdown against your real project — in your editor, the CLI, and CI.

Speaker is a Codex skill project for academic presentations: read real.pptx, combine text extraction, PPTX structure parsing, page-by-page rendering, OCR, and visual review to generate page-by-page speaker notes, and write a clean version of the lecture into the PowerPoint comment area.
LLMInternSkill: LLM internship resume and job-search Codex Skill for resume polish, JD tailoring, evidence guard, interview grilling, and Project Scout. 大模型实习简历与求职工具箱。
A prior-art search for your code ideas. Stop building what already exists.
An open-source Cotypist with macOS system wide AI autocomplete
🐴 Prompt-first harness engineering for safer AI coding agent workflows.

沙漏记忆系统 V2.10 — pip install nexsandglass。纯本地零依赖沙漏记忆系统。Drift-Weaved Time: The Soul Forged from Memory’s Flow—— 让记忆之流编织时间，锻造与你共鸣的永恒灵魂。 项目概念简介： 在传统技术止步于提取冰冷事实的边界之外，我们开启了全新的篇章——「Drift-Weaved Time」。这不是对时间的被动记录，而是一场以「偏移率」为金线、以神经网络为织布机的全新探索。灵魂的本质不在于静态的复刻，而在于每一次细微的偏移、每一次独特的抉择。

Git Identity Manager is a cross-platform desktop app for managing multiple Git identities with a simple interface. It helps developers switch between personal, company, and client GitHub accounts by configuring Git user profiles, repository-based identity rules, and credentials in one place.
Share your terminal with coding agent in one command. Lightweight shell proxy, written in Rust.
The 10-second codebase tour. Understand any repo in one command.
An agent lives in Canvas that does all of your homework

Keep one source of truth for your AI coding-agent rules. Convert and sync between AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, .cursorrules, Copilot, Windsurf, Cline, Aider & Gemini — or scaffold a fresh AGENTS.md. Zero dependencies.
Native macOS (menu bar) & Windows (system tray) dashboard for Pi agent usage, cost, languages, models, projects & tokens. Local-first, optional SSH sync.
Engineering workflows for AI coding agents or flesh engineers. It helps absorb silent base-model quality drift.
A calm e-ink desk dashboard. Shows the few numbers you actually care about, then sits there quietly.
Terminal kanban on plain markdown, with optional Today/Tomorrow planner, 24h agenda + calendar, and a live Claude Code agent view. Use only the panels you want.
A Claude Code + Codex skill that turns a local project into a macOS Dock-launchable app — native window, its own icon, no Electron. [The Windows version is in BETA]
Uncensored AI coding agent in your terminal. Does the work, skips the sermon. 256K context, crypto-only billing, no card on file.
Automatic Auction House sniper bot for Forza Horizon 6 (FH6). Screen-reading buyout automation. Windows, open source.
